title: crotalaria androyensis
intro: Crotalaria androyensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Androy crotalaria or Androy rattlebox. The plant is traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria androyensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction, made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a powder, which can be used to make capsules or taken orally.
